name: Demolition Protocol
brief: Open a route by operating hatchways and breaching sealed access points.
objective: Perform Breach on at least seven breach points or hatchways and leave at least seven open.

startingNpos.deployment: Wholly within Player B territory, spread evenly with intervening terrain in control range when viewed from Player A's drop zone.

rules.name: Sabotage
rules.summary: Player operatives can perform Breach on a hatchway access point. Open it, and it cannot be closed for the rest of the battle.

victory.win: Seven or more breach point or hatchway terrain features are open and Breach has been performed on at least seven of them.

setupChecks.label: Arrange the killzone as shown on the Mission 2 map and identify the Player A drop zone and Player B territory.
Identify every hatchway access point and the two breach points shown on the mission map.
Generate 2D3+3 starting NPOs and set each up wholly within Player B territory, spread evenly, with intervening terrain within its control range when viewed from Player A’s drop zone.
Give every starting NPO a Conceal order.
Start with 2CP total and select up to four equipment options, recording and managing both for tabletop play; the Guide does not track or validate their effects.
